Describe the sequence of trash collection actions performed by the workers throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 00:02, a worker in a purple shirt handles a yellow trash bin near the stopped green truck. At 00:12, a worker in a purple apron carries a yellow bin towards the truck's rear compactor. At 00:18, two workers lift a green bin together to empty it into the back of the vehicle.

question: Track the movement of trash bins and workers relative to the garbage truck.
canonical_answer: At 00:03, a large white sack hangs off the right side of the truck's rear platform. At 00:13, a worker stands inside the back of the truck managing the waste load. At 00:19, the rear compactor is open as workers dump a green bin into the storage area.
